# Q1 filter/fields/limit baseline NETWORK projection (network beaconing)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

C2 beaconing detection — find steady-cadence connections to a single destination. Q1 filter/fields/limit baseline NETWORK projection.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_local_ip != null and action_remote_ip != null | fields agent_hostname, action_local_ip, action_remote_ip, action_remote_port, _time | sort asc _time | limit 20
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 20). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
